creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
It looks like there is a newer release, confusingly labelled 3.2.7.  Does this look good to you?  It conforms to the Porter's Handbook and fixes warnings reported by portfmt/portclippy/portlint.  I tested in poudriere 11/12 i386/amd64 with the default options and am build testing other option combinations now.

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D23901
